attributes.title: [vSphere OTel] Hosts
attributes.description: ESXi host performance: CPU, memory, disk I/O latency, and network throughput per host from the OTel vcenterreceiver.

params.markdown:
## [vSphere OTel] Hosts

This dashboard provides host-level performance monitoring:
- CPU utilization and usage trends per host
- Memory utilization and usage per host
- Disk I/O latency (max) per host
- Network throughput and packet rates
- Top hosts by resource consumption

query.esql:
TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.disk.latency.max))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.disk.latency.max))

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS hosts = COUNT_DISTINCT(vcenter.host.name)

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS hosts = COUNT_DISTINCT(vcenter.host.name)

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS capacity = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.capacity))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS capacity = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.capacity))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.usage))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.throughput))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.throughput))

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization), mem = AVG(vcenter.host.memory.utilization) BY vcenter.host.name, vcenter.datacenter.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT cpu DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization), mem = AVG(vcenter.host.memory.utilization) BY vcenter.host.name, vcenter.datacenter.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT cpu DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.usage)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.usage)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.usage)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.usage)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Host Max Disk Latency Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.disk.latency.max)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.disk.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS lat = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.disk.latency.max)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.disk.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.disk.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.disk.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.disk.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Host Network Packet Rate Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.packet.rate IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS pps = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.packet.rate)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.packet.rate IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS pps = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.packet.rate)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization)), cpu_usage = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.usage)), cpu_capacity = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.capacity)) BY vcenter.host.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT cpu DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization)), cpu_usage = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.usage)), cpu_capacity = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.capacity)) BY vcenter.host.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT cpu DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization)), mem_usage = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.usage)) BY vcenter.host.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT mem DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization)), mem_usage = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.usage)) BY vcenter.host.name, vcenter.cluster.name
| SORT mem DESC
| LIMIT 20
